identity.description: Top-level repository manifest for the HorrorPlace VM-constellation. Lists Tier-1 core, Tier-2 vaults, Tier-3 labs, and governance repos.

repos.name: horror-place-core
repos.description: Core schemas, invariants, entertainment metrics, style contracts, and public registries for the VM-constellation.

repos.name: horror-place-api
repos.description: Public HTTP and Lua API specifications and stubs for HorrorPlace runtime integration.

repos.name: horror-place-engine
repos.description: Underground persona and event implementations, runtime Lua state machines, and signed agent artifacts.

repos.name: horror-place-orchestrator
repos.description: Schema-first orchestrator service and CI workflows for validating descriptors and mutating Tier-1 registries.

repos.name: horror-place-registries
repos.description: Canonical NDJSON registries for events, regions, personas, styles, and invariant bundles, referencing underground implementations by descriptor.

repos.name: horror-place-atrocity-seeds
repos.description: Vault for invariant-bound history and event seeds, tied to Tier-1 schemas and Dead-Ledger attestation.

repos.name: horror-place-black-archivum
repos.description: Vault for normalized trauma archives and invariant bundles referenced from Tier-1 registries via deadledgerref.

repos.name: horror-place-spectral-foundry
repos.description: Vault for spectral persona and encounter templates, spectral seed contracts, and underground AI behavior definitions.

repos.name: horror-place-obscura-nexus
repos.description: Vault for experimental style contracts and event variants, expressed via the Style Contract DSL.

repos.name: horror-place-liminal-continuum
repos.description: Agent marketplace and ranking vault for signed agent artifacts and Dead-Ledger-linked performance summaries.

repos.name: horror-place-neural-resonance-lab
repos.description: Lab for BCI, haptics, and physiological telemetry; defines BCI metric mappings and haptic pattern contracts.

repos.name: horror-place-redacted-chronicles
repos.description: Lab for redaction and summarization of raw BCI and gameplay telemetry into Tier-1-safe metric bundles.

repos.name: horror-place-process-gods-research
repos.description: Lab for Process-type personas and high-SHCI experiments under strict invariant and metric constraints.

repos.name: horror-place-dead-ledger-network
repos.description: Dead-Ledger ZKP and entitlement nexus: proof envelopes, verifiers registry, spectral seed and agent attestations.

repos.name: horror-place-constellation-contracts
repos.description: Constellation-wide contracts, ALN templates, and manifests (including this file) for VM-constellation governance.
